hyperedges.label: Hero Redesign: Organic Dark + Line Mask Reveal + GSAP Timeline

nodes.label: Animation A — Line Mask Reveal
nodes.rationale: Each text line slides up from a hidden clip container (overflow:hidden). Most-used technique in premium agency sites. Polished and editorial. Implemented with GSAP SplitText or manual overflow:hidden divs per line. Uses cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1) easing with staggered delays.

nodes.label: Animation B — Word Float (Springy)
nodes.rationale: Each word bounces up with a slight spring overshoot using rotateX(30deg) and translateY. More playful and energetic than mask reveal. Uses GSAP stagger with power2.out or elastic ease. Cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1) for spring effect.

nodes.label: Animation C — Cinematic Blur Bloom
nodes.rationale: Text fades in from blurred, slightly scaled-down state — like camera pulling into focus. Background glow blooms as text clears. Atmospheric and premium. Uses GSAP with filter:blur() and scale. GlowBloom keyframe scales orb from 0.2 to 1.3 with opacity fade.

nodes.label: Design Direction A — Editorial Dark
nodes.rationale: Serif headline, minimal ornamentation, high typographic contrast. Luxury magazine feel — no heavy gradients. Serif + sans-serif pairing creates visual tension. Hero and footer feel like distinct chapters of the same story. Uses Georgia serif font with -2px tracking.

nodes.label: Design Direction B — Bold & Centred (Refined)
nodes.rationale: Keeps dark atmospheric palette but replaces repetitive marquee with subtle radial glow. Adds clear CTA pair. Centered layout with strong typographic hierarchy and category pill tag. Clean and intentional — no filler elements. Background: radial-gradient with #050814 base.

nodes.label: Design Direction C — Split Contrast
nodes.rationale: Half dark, half light layout. Text on dark side, product visual on light side. Strong visual contrast instantly distinctive. Footer mirrors with light text on clean dark panel. Feels like a product brand, not just a landing page.

nodes.label: Take 1 — Architectural Grid
nodes.rationale: Subtle grid overlay replaces the marquee watermark. Flat white + single accent color — no gradient text fills. Square-cornered buttons feel more product, less landing page. Structural index label on left rail. Footer uses ghost/muted headline — 'Simplified.' fades back. Grid: 60px x 60px with rgba(255,255,255,0.025) lines.

nodes.label: Take 2 — Organic Dark
nodes.rationale: Radial glow orb instead of grid — atmospheric but restrained. Rounded pill buttons matching navbar style for cohesion. Third headline line intentionally faded — creates depth without color. Mini stats in bottom bar (24/7, <2s) as product credibility signal. No decorative watermarks.

nodes.label: Design Direction: Take 2 Organic Dark (Approved)
nodes.rationale: Approved design direction chosen from brainstorm: Take 2 — Organic Dark with Line Mask Reveal animation. Addresses problem that existing Hero and Footer share identical marquee watermarks, same #020617 gradient palette, gradient text fills, and generic glassmorphism — making them feel templated. Goal: clean, intentional, craft-forward design.

nodes.label: SoterCare Redesign Design Principles
nodes.rationale: Core principles: no gradient text fills; no marquee watermarks; no heavy overlay gradients; restrained accent color #a0cbdb max 1-2 uses per section; no generic glassmorphism — buttons are solid white or subtle border-only; animation serves content with every element having a reason.

nodes.label: Hero GSAP Animation Sequence
nodes.rationale: Sequenced via single GSAP timeline on mount: glow orb (0s, power2.out), pill tag (0.1s), headline line 1 (0.2s), line 2 (0.32s), line 3 (0.44s), descriptor (0.56s), CTA group (0.64s), stats (0.72s). Line reveals 0.75s duration, fades 0.5s. All use power3.out. Scroll-exit via ScrollTrigger scrub scaling hero to 0.8.

nodes.label: Shared Design Tokens (Hero & Footer)
nodes.rationale: Tokens: --bg-dark #080b14 for hero+footer background; --accent #a0cbdb for pill/glow max 1 per section; --text-faded-1 rgba(255,255,255,0.22) for headline line 3; --text-faded-2 rgba(255,255,255,0.15) for footer 'Simplified.'; --text-dim rgba(255,255,255,0.30) for descriptors; --border-subtle rgba(255,255,255,0.08) for structural dividers.
